question: List the id, first name and last name of the customers who both have placed more than 2 orders and have bought at least 3 items.
sql: SELECT Customers.customer_id, Customers.customer_first_name, Customers.customer_last_name FROM Customers JOIN Orders ON Customers.customer_id = Orders.customer_id JOIN Order_Items ON Orders.order_id = Order_Items.order_id GROUP BY Customers.customer_id HAVING COUNT(Orders.order_id) > 2 AND COUNT(Order_Items.order_item_id) >= 3;

back_translation.intent: 查找具有超过两个订单且至少三个订单项的客户信息

semantic.reason: 过滤条件未正确应用，原始问题要求对聚合后的订单数和商品数进行筛选（应使用HAVING子句），而反向翻译描述中将过滤条件置于空的filters字段，导致语义不一致。
